description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic (and eastern Arabic numerals). Dated: 5582 AM, which is 1821/22 CE. Mentions the mustaʿrib congregation in the header and, below that, the holidays Hannukah and Purim. All the documents in this folder appear to be in the same hand, though this one pertains to the Mustaʿrib congregation and the next to the Sephardic congregation. Needs examination.
tags: Late JA, Purim, 19th c, Musta'rib, Hanukkah
description_he: חשבונות בערבית-יהודית; 5582 (= 1821/22 לספירה); כותרת: קהילת המוסתערבים; מזכיר חנוכה ופורים; כל המסמכים בתיקייה זו נראים בכתב יד אחד
